Xenolord.partner_effect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by 20~50%. (Does not stack)
get_via: raid-boss reward: Invader from Space Xenolord drops its Huge Dark Egg (90%)
raid-boss reward: Invader from Space (Ultra) Xenolord drops its Huge Dark Egg (90%)
breeding: same-species pair only (breeds true, no cross-combo produces it)

Xenovader.partner_effect: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by 100~160%. (Does not stack)
get_via: caged pal in enemy camps (free to recruit) (Lv. 25-30)
breeding: same-species pair only (breeds true, no cross-combo produces it)

alpha: Unwavering Loyalty Yakumo (Lv. 47-49) - Cherry Blossom Cave
get_via: caged pal in enemy camps (free to recruit) (Lv. 30-65)
